extDesc.message: Annotate any web page by clicking its elements and export precise AI-ready instructions (CSS selectors, paths, styles). 100% local.

emptyState.message: No annotations yet. Click “Annotate an element”, then click what you want changed.

pngTitle.message: PNG capture of the page with badges

missingEl.message: Element not found on the current page

errorsInfo.message: ⚠ $1 JS error(s) detected — included in the export

modeFixTip.message: Strict: repair exactly what is requested, nothing else

modeImproveTip.message: The AI also suggests related improvements

mdInstrFix.message:
**Instructions for the AI**: each annotation below identifies a precise element
on the page by its CSS selector and its full DOM path.
Fix the JavaScript errors first, then apply EXACTLY the requested changes
to the matching elements in the source code. Do not modify anything else.

mdInstrFixFile.message:
**Instructions for the AI**: each annotation below identifies a precise element
on the page by its CSS selector and its full DOM path.
Open the file listed above, fix the JavaScript errors first, then apply
EXACTLY the requested changes to the matching elements. Do not modify anything else.

mdInstrImprove.message:
**Instructions for the AI**: each annotation below identifies a precise element
on the page by its CSS selector and its full DOM path.
Apply the requested changes, AND suggest related improvements
(design, accessibility, performance, consistency) around them.
List every improvement you make beyond the annotations.

mdInstrImproveFile.message:
**Instructions for the AI**: each annotation below identifies a precise element
on the page by its CSS selector and its full DOM path.
Open the file listed above, apply the requested changes, AND suggest
related improvements (design, accessibility, performance, consistency).
List every improvement you make beyond the annotations.

mdInstrAudit.message:
**Instructions for the AI**: do NOT modify anything.
Analyze the page using the outline, the JavaScript errors and the annotated
points below, then produce a structured report: issues ranked by severity,
with a concrete recommendation for each.

mdInstrAuditFile.message:
**Instructions for the AI**: do NOT modify anything.
Read the file listed above and analyze it using the outline, the JavaScript
errors and the annotated points below, then produce a structured report:
issues ranked by severity, with a concrete recommendation for each.

mdErrors.message: ⚠ JavaScript errors detected on the page

mdSizeDetail.message: $1×$2 px — ≈$3 px from the top of the page
